summary: Shares of Union Pacific Corp. and Norfolk Southern Corp. slumped the most in more than a year after a key regulator paused its review of their planned $72 billion merger, potentially delaying what would be the biggest rail deal ever.

title: Lilly's One-Time Cholesterol Treatment
title_cn: 礼来公司的一次性胆固醇治疗
summary:
Eli Lilly is developing a groundbreaking one-time gene-editing treatment that could permanently lower bad cholesterol and reduce heart disease risk. Bloomberg's Madison Muller joins Open Interest to break down the science, the risks, and why Lilly is racing to expand beyond obesity drugs into its next major growth era.

(Correction: The headline of this video has been edited to clarify the treatment) (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US, Iran Truce Hopes Lift Stocks | Open Interest 5/28/2026
title_cn: 美国与伊朗停战希望提振股市未平仓合约 2026 年 5 月 28 日
summary: Get a jump start on the US trading day with Matt Miller and Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Open Interest." Stocks climb on reports the US and Iran may extend their truce, pending President Trump’s backing. Software splits as Salesforce disappoints, while Snowflake surges on AI demand. Plus, Goldman’s Ben Snider joins Bloomberg Open Interest on his higher S&P target, Sridhar Ramaswamy, the CEO of Snowflake gives his outlook, Miriam Wheeler calls AI a "generational opportunity” and Kayak’ CEO Peer Bueller weighs in on the travel rally after news of the potential ceasefire. (Source: Bloomberg)

summary: Jonathan Ferro, Lisa Abramowicz and Annmarie Hordern speak daily with leaders and decision makers from Wall Street to Washington and beyond. No other program better positions investors and executives for the trading day. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tilman Fertitta’s Years-Long Pursuit of Caesars Is Paying Off
title_cn: 蒂尔曼·费尔蒂塔 (Tilman Fertitta) 多年来对凯撒的追求正在得到回报
summary:
Real estate mogul Tilman Fertitta’s years-long quest to buy Caesars Entertainment Inc. is finally paying off: His firm struck a $5.7 billion, all-cash deal for the Las Vegas company on Thursday that will add some 52 casinos in the US to his entertainment empire. 

Fertitta’s pursuit of Caesars dates as far back as 2018, when the owner of the Golden Nugget casinos approached the company about a possible merger. Fertitta had borrowed heavily to buy the Houston Rockets basketball team for $2.2 billion, and the potential merger was seen at the time as a means of folding his debt into a larger company. 

Fertitta eventually built a stake in Caesars, signaling his continued interest in a tie-up. As part of the takeover announced on Thursday, Fertitta Entertainment Inc. is paying Caesars shareholders $31 a share in cash. We get reaction from Jody Lurie, Senior Credit Analyst for Bloomberg Intelligence. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Swings on Reports of Possible US-Iran Pact to Extend Truce
title_cn: 美伊可能达成延长休战协议的报道导致油价波动
summary: Oil fluctuated as traders digested news that the US and Iran have reached a tentative deal to extend a ceasefire and work toward a pact to end the war, stoking optimism that the three-month conflict could be nearing a resolution.

title: US Defense Orders Surge to Near-Record Amid War With Iran
title_cn: 在与伊朗的战争中，美国国防订单激增至接近历史最高水平
summary: US orders for defense capital goods surged in April to the second-highest level on record, adding to signs that the Iran war is boosting demand for military hardware.

title: Aluminum Market Tightness Could Continue for 'Long Time,' Morgan Stanley Says
title_cn: 摩根士丹利表示铝市场紧张可能会持续“很长一段时间”
summary: Amy Gower, metals and mining commodities strategist at Morgan Stanley, discusses the impact of the Iran war on aluminum prices. Speaking on Bloomberg Television, she warns the market could "stay quite tight" for a long time. "Most of the smelters that are shut are damaged, and so they're looking at sort of twelve-month restart timelines," Gower explains. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Microsoft Partner IREN Borrows $3.6 Billion for Nvidia Chips
title_cn: 微软合作伙伴 IREN 借款 36 亿美元购买 Nvidia 芯片
summary: IREN Ltd., a company that builds and operates data centers for training artificial intelligence models, borrowed about $3.6 billion to provide computing capacity to Microsoft Corp.

title: Petrobras Hikes Gasoline Prices After Brazil Subsidies Approved
title_cn: 巴西补贴获批后，巴西国家石油公司提高汽油价格
summary: Brazil’s oil producer Petrobras is increasing domestic gasoline prices for distributors after the government approved new subsidies to shield consumers from Iran war-fueled crude price hikes.

title: Gold Advances as Report of US-Iran Deal Eases Higher Rates Bets
title_cn: 美伊协议报告缓解加息押注，金价上涨
summary: Gold edged higher after Axios reported that Iran and the US have reached a deal to extend a truce and work toward an agreement to end the war, pending final approval from US President Donald Trump.

title: Tough World for Crypto ETFs: Roxanna Islam

summary: Roxanna Islam, head of sector & industry research at TMX VettaFi, joins Katie Greifeld and Eric Balchunas on "Bloomberg ETF IQ." Bitcoin briefly fell below $73,000 on Thursday despite a fresh push from President Trump for the CLARITY Act, suggesting pro-crypto messaging from  Washington is losing its ability to drive gains in digital assets. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Investors Back Brazil’s Pax in Bet on AI-Powered Policing
title_cn: 美国投资者支持巴西的 Pax 押注人工智能驱动的警务
summary: A Brazilian artificial intelligence startup that helps police investigate violent crime is planning a rapid expansion at home, betting its technology is ready for wider use as Brazil confronts mounting public security concerns.

title: Anthropic Raises at $965 Billion Valuation, Eclipsing OpenAI
title_cn: Anthropic 估值达到 9650 亿美元，超越 OpenAI
summary: Anthropic PBC raised $65 billion in a funding round that valued the artificial intelligence company at $965 billion including the new investment, eclipsing rival OpenAI’s value for the first time.

title: AI Inference Demand Won't Stop Anytime Soon, Says Benchmark's Vishria
title_cn: Benchmark 的 Vishria 表示，人工智能推理需求不会很快停止
summary: Eric Vishria, partner at Benchmark, joins to discuss the high demand for fast AI inference and to give his outlook for the physical AI space as companies navigate constrains around compute, from memory and power to chip bottlenecks. He joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Anthropic’s Growing Trust Problem
title_cn: Anthropic 日益严重的信任问题
summary: Anthropic is trying to build the world’s most powerful AI while convincing governments and customers it can be trusted, explains Bloomberg Opinion columnist Parmy Olson. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Boston Seizes on California Billionaire Tax to Lure AI Jobs
title_cn: 波士顿利用加州亿万富翁税来吸引人工智能工作
summary: The talent at some of America’s hottest artificial intelligence companies often passes through Boston-area universities before heading west to build billion-dollar businesses in Silicon Valley. Massachusetts business and political leaders say California’s proposed tax on billionaires is an opportunity to change that.

title: Anthropic Candidates Pay $4,600 for Coaching to Get Hot Jobs
title_cn: 人类候选人支付 4,600 美元获得热门工作的辅导
summary: Landing a job at Anthropic is so competitive that applicants are spending $4,600 on private interview coaching. Candidates say the startup's intense culture screen feels less like an interview and more like therapy. While the company faces incredible pressure to survive economically while keeping its values, people are clamoring to get in. Bloomberg's Jo Constanz joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Snowflake Jumps Most Since 2020 After Amazon Deal | Bloomberg Tech 5/28/2026
title_cn: 亚马逊交易后雪花股价自 2020 年以来涨幅最大 |彭博科技 2026 年 5 月 28 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow break down Snowflake's share moves after the software maker gave a strong outlook and signed a $6 billion deal with Amazon. Plus, Bloomberg News pulls back the curtains on Apple's revamped Siri design ahead of its WWDC debut. And, Meta introduces paid chatbot subscriptions to help offset its AI infrastructure costs. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Maritime Tech Company Navier's First Major Commercial Rollout
title_cn: 海事科技公司 Navier 的首次重大商业部署
summary: US-based maritime technology company Navier is deploying 100 electric vessels across the Maldives to build an inter-island transportation network linking airports, resorts, and local communities. The rollout marks a major milestone for electrified marine mobility. Navier CEO Sampriti Bhattacharyya joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Anthropic Plans Wide Release of Mythos-Level AI Models in Weeks
title_cn: Anthropic 计划在几周内广泛发布神话级人工智能模型
summary: Anthropic PBC plans to widely release new artificial intelligence models in the coming weeks with cybersecurity capabilities comparable to Mythos, a technology the company previously said was too dangerous to make available to the general public.

title: Why Prediction Markets Are a New Frontier for Insider Trading
title_cn: 为什么预测市场是内幕交易的新领域
summary: Prediction markets, where users can place bets on real-world outcomes in anything from sports and award shows to elections, interest rate decisions, and even military operations, have become a multi-billion-dollar industry in just a few years. Along the way, they have also become the focus of growing concern that some participants are using privileged information to profit.

title: BYD Debuts China’s Most Advanced EV Chip in Smart-Driving Push
title_cn: 比亚迪首发国内最先进电动汽车芯片 发力智能驾驶
summary: BYD Co., the world’s largest electric vehicle maker, unveiled a series of technology advances, including what it calls China’s first automotive-grade 4-nanometer chip for self-driving cars.

title: EU Says It Needs €120 Billion to Revive Local Chip Production
title_cn: 欧盟表示需要 1200 亿欧元重振本地芯片生产
summary: The European Union is making a fresh attempt to revive its faltering semiconductor industry via a rebooted Chips Act, an effort expected to require €120 billion ($140 billion) in public-private investment by 2035, according to draft plans seen by Bloomberg News.

title: EU Braces for Talks With Anthropic on Access to Mythos AI Model
title_cn: 欧盟准备与 Anthropic 就 Mythos 人工智能模型的使用进行谈判
summary: European Commission officials are planning to meet with Anthropic PBC to seek more information on the company’s Mythos model and request making the groundbreaking artificial intelligence tool available to the bloc, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: European Stocks End Weaker as Traders Await Truce Confirmation
title_cn: 交易员等待休战确认，欧洲股市收低
summary: European stocks fell on Thursday, failing to entirely recoup their early hefty losses even after Axios reported the US and Iran are close to a diplomatic breakthrough in the war.

title: Apple to Overhaul iOS 27 Siri, AI Features
title_cn: 苹果将​​全面修改 iOS 27 Siri、AI 功能
summary: Apple is set to release a pretty significant redesign to Siri in its iOS 27 that includes AI features. Mark Gurman explains  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Salesforce Gives Lukewarm Outlook That Fails to Ease AI Fear
title_cn: Salesforce 给出的前景不温不火，未能缓解对人工智能的恐惧
summary: Salesforce Inc. gave a revenue outlook for the current period that fell just short of analysts’ estimates, failing to ease the concerns of investors already worried about the possibility that artificial intelligence will disrupt the software business.

title: Travel Stocks Jump on Cease-Fire Talk
title_cn: 旅游股因停火谈判而上涨
summary: Breaking Iran cease-fire headlines sent travel stocks soaring as oil prices dropped sharply. Kayak CEO Peer Bueller joined Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why travelers are still booking trips despite geopolitical chaos, rising airfare, and inflation, and why AI is changing how consumers search for deals. Plus, the hidden link between Middle East tensions and airline profits. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple Is Overhauling Siri to Bring AI to the Masses
title_cn: 苹果正在彻底改革 Siri，将人工智能带给大众
summary: Bloomberg's Mark Gurman says consumers "should be pumped" about the massive changes Apple is making to Siri. It's part of their effort to bring artificial intelligence to the masses. The updates are expected to be announced at the  June 8 Worldwide Developers Conference. He reports on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Space Startup Raises Funds for Laser Satellite Links
title_cn: 太空初创公司为激光卫星链路筹集资金
summary: Observable Space raised $90 million in its debut funding round as the company seeks to use lasers to help satellites and potentially orbiting data centers move information to and from Earth.

title: Musalem Says Fed Can't Rely on Possible Productivity Boom From AI
title_cn: 穆萨莱姆表示美联储不能依赖人工智能可能带来的生产力繁荣
summary: Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis President Alberto Musalem says policymakers cannot depend on a potential productivity boom from AI to ease elevated inflation at a conference in Reykjavík, Iceland. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nvidia CEO Hosts Dinner for Partners in Taiwan
title_cn: Nvidia 首席执行官为台湾合作伙伴举办晚宴
summary: Jensen Huang, chief executive officer of Nvidia Corp., signs autographs as he arrives for a dinner event in Taipei, Taiwan. The event, dubbed "The Trillion Dollar Banquet," is a regular dinner hosted by Huang when he visits his Taiwanese partners. Huang has been in the country this week attending multiple events.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Emerging Market Currencies Jump on Report of US-Iran Pact
title_cn: 美伊协议报告推动新兴市场货币上涨
summary: Emerging-market currencies jumped on a report that Iran and the US have reached a deal to extend a truce and work toward an agreement to end the war.

title: Private Credit Snubs $2.5 Billion Deal by Thoma Bravo’s Sophos
title_cn: 私人信贷拒绝了 Thoma Bravo 的 Sophos 的 25 亿美元交易
summary: Just last year, private credit firms were falling over themselves to lend to software borrowers like Sophos. Now, AI anxiety has snarled up the market so much that Thoma Bravo’s $2.5 billion refinancing for the cybersecurity firm is facing hesitant lenders.

title: Caesars Entertainment Agrees to Buyout; Snowflake Soars on Outlook | Stock Movers
title_cn: 凯撒娱乐同意收购； Outlook 上的雪花飞扬 |库存搬运工
summary:
On this episode of Stock Movers with John Tucker:

- Apple (APPL) is moving on news the next iPhone, iPad and Mac software updates will feature a revamped Siri interface and a new chatbot-style app. The new Siri will include features such as the ability to understand personal data and analyze on-screen content, a rebuilt model using Google Gemini technology, and AI-powered web search.
- Caesars Entertainment (CZR) shares are on the move as the company agreed to be bought by Fertitta Entertainment Inc. in a $5.7 billion, all-cash deal. Caesars shareholders will get $31 a share in cash, which represents a 49% premium over Caesars’ stock price on Feb. 25.
- Snowflake (SNOW) is soaring after the software maker gave a stronger-than-expected annual outlook and signed a $6 billion multiyear agreement to use Amazon.com Inc.’s cloud services and chips. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Waymo to Deploy Robotaxi Built With Zeekr to Expand Public Rides
title_cn: Waymo 将部署由 Zeekr 打造的 Robotaxi 以扩大公共乘车范围
summary: Alphabet Inc.’s Waymo unit will deploy a new autonomous vehicle designed specifically for robotaxi use, offering public rides in California and Arizona without human supervision.

title: Tilman Fertitta’s Years-Long Pursuit of Caesars Is Paying Off
title_cn: 蒂尔曼·费尔蒂塔 (Tilman Fertitta) 多年来对凯撒的追求正在得到回报
summary: Real estate mogul Tilman Fertitta’s years-long quest to buy Caesars Entertainment Inc. is finally paying off: His firm struck a $5.7 billion, all-cash deal for the Las Vegas company on Thursday that will add some 52 casinos in the US to his entertainment empire.

title: Snowflake CEO Weighs In on Sales Outlook, Signing $6 Billion Deal With Amazon
title_cn: Snowflake 首席执行官谈销售前景，与亚马逊签署 60 亿美元协议
summary: Snowflake Inc. shares jumped after the software maker gave a stronger-than-expected annual outlook and signed a $6 billion multiyear agreement to use Amazon’s cloud services and chips. Snowflake CEO Sridhar Ramaswamy speaks to Bloomberg's Matt Miller and Caroline Hyde about the results and how it will work with Amazon. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Goldman's Wheeler Sees 'Generational Opportunity' in AI
title_cn: 高盛的惠勒看到了人工智能的“世代机会”
summary: Miriam Wheeler, Goldman Sachs global head of leverage finance, says investors are focused on hard assets associated with the infrastructure buildout of artificial intelligence and this is a "generational opportunity." Wheeler says power demand for data centers will double over the next few years. She speaks to Dani Burger on Bloomberg Open Interest. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Pentagon Doesn't Have a Game Plan on Defense Spending, Says Mark Pocan
title_cn: 马克·波坎表示，五角大楼没有国防支出计划
summary: Democrat Representative from Wisconsin Mark Pocan said that he doesn't have faith in Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth and that the department doesn't have a game plan when it comes to defense spending, after requesting a record defense budget request of $1.5 trillion. Pocan said that the administration also does not have a plan when it came to the long term implications of war with Iran.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Will Not Make a Bad Deal With Iran, Bessent Says
title_cn: 贝森特称特朗普不会与伊朗达成糟糕的协议
summary: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent says President Donald Trump will not make a bad deal with Iran. Bessent says Iran must turn over its highly enriched uranium, they can't pursue a nuclear weapon and the Strait of Hormuz has to be fully open. He spoke at the White House.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US, Iran Agree to 60-Day Truce Renewal Pending Trump Signoff
title_cn: 美国和伊朗同意延长 60 天停战协议，等待特朗普签署
summary: The US and Iran have reached a tentative deal to extend a ceasefire by 60 days and launch further talks on Tehran’s nuclear program, a person with knowledge of the matter said, raising hopes the three-month conflict could be nearing a resolution.

title: Ex-Banco Master CEO Proposes New Plea Deal to Brazil Police
title_cn: Banco Master 前首席执行官向巴西警方提出新的认罪协议
summary: Former Banco Master Chief Executive Officer Daniel Vorcaro resumed talks with Brazil’s Federal Police over a potential plea deal, a week after investigators rejected his initial cooperation proposal.

title: Europe Weighs Less Reliance on US As Asia Doubles Down
title_cn: 亚洲加大力度，欧洲减少对美国的依赖
summary: Tension between the US and other NATO members is driving countries in Europe to consider collective defense that’s less reliant on America - yet the picture is much different in Asia.

title: Oil Pares Gain on News of Possible US-Iran Pact to Extend Truce
title_cn: 美伊可能达成延长休战协议的消息推动油价上涨
summary:
Oil pared gains on a report that the US and Iran have reached a preliminary agreement to extend the ceasefire between the two countries and launch negotiations on the Islamic Republic’s nuclear program.

The memorandum of understanding would extend the truce by 60 days and states that shipping through the vital Strait of Hormuz would be “unrestricted,” without any tolls paid to Iran, but the potential pact still requires President Trump’s approval, Axios reported. Trump wants several days to mull over the deal, according to the report.

An agreement to extend the truce would represent a diplomatic breakthrough and potentially bring the US and Iran closer to reopening normal maritime traffic through the strait, which usually carries around a fifth of the world’s oil and liquefied natural gas supply. For more, we speak with Mike McGlone, Senior Commodity Strategist for Bloomberg Intelligence. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Florida’s Property-Tax Plan Risks Charging Fees for ‘Everything’
title_cn: 佛罗里达州的财产税计划面临着对“一切”收取费用的风险
summary: Palm Beach can count on its billionaires to keep picking up the tab for schools, firefighters and parks if Florida slashes property taxes. Many other local governments will have a tougher time making up the difference.

title: CFTC Moves to Undo Settlement That Had Gemini Pay $5 Million
title_cn: CFTC 撤销 Gemini 支付 500 万美元的和解协议
summary: The US Commodity Futures Trading Commission and Gemini Trust Co., led by the billionaire Winklevoss brothers, want to dissolve a 2025 settlement that resulted in the cryptocurrency exchange agreeing to pay $5 million to end an agency lawsuit.

title: US Trade Chief Says German Streaming Quotas Violate Trade Deal
title_cn: 美国贸易主管称德国流媒体配额违反贸易协议
summary: President Donald Trump’s top trade official criticized a German draft law that would force American streaming services to invest in the country’s film sector, calling the measures discriminatory and a violation of the European Union’s trade deal with the US.

title: Mullin Defends Migrant Jail Where Senator Was Pepper-Sprayed
title_cn: 穆林为参议员被胡椒喷雾的移民监狱辩护
summary: Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin defended conditions at a migrant detention center in New Jersey that was the scene of weekend protests in which two people were arrested and US Senator Andy Kim was hit with a cloud of pepper spray.

title: Capitol Hill Staff Won’t Rule Out Year-End Bipartisan Tax Deal
title_cn: 国会山工作人员不会排除年终两党税收协议
summary: Capitol Hill tax staff haven’t ruled out an end-of-year bipartisan tax package to adjust retirement fixes and international tax issues that have gone unaddressed—even as Republican lawmakers race against the clock to pass a “skinny” reconciliation package.

title: Former Businessman Becomes Latvian Premier After Drone Spat
title_cn: 无人机口角后前商人成为拉脱维亚总理
summary: Latvian Prime Minister Andris Kulbergs’s new government won a vote of confidence in parliament on Thursday following the collapse of the previous coalition in a row over drone incursions.

title: Wall Street Rushes to Mimic Crypto's Playbook on Capitol Hill
title_cn: 华尔街纷纷效仿国会山的加密货币剧本
summary: Banks are crafting a political spending strategy that resembles a structure the crypto industry has used.

title: Kenya, US Are in Ebola Complex Talks After Quarantine Report
title_cn: 检疫报告后肯尼亚和美国正在就埃博拉疫情进行谈判
summary: Kenya is in talks with the US on Ebola-related health cooperation after media reports that the Trump administration is planning to send Americans exposed to the virus to a quarantine facility in the East African nation being built by the US military.

title: Trump Files Fresh $10 Billion Suit Over WSJ’s Epstein Story
title_cn: 特朗普因《华尔街日报》报道爱泼斯坦的故事提起新的 100 亿美元诉讼
summary: President Donald Trump filed a new version of his $10 billion libel lawsuit against the Wall Street Journal and its parent company News Corp. over an article about his alleged close ties to Jeffrey Epstein, after an earlier version of the suit was tossed out by a judge.

title: Argentine Provinces Tap Global Markets That Sovereign Avoids
title_cn: 阿根廷各省开拓主权回避的全球市场
summary: Argentine provinces are tapping global bond markets at the fastest pace in nearly a decade, even as the federal government sticks to short-term debt in the local market amid investor fears over the 2027 elections.

title: NYC’s Mamdani Mimics Trump and Musk DOGE With COGE Plan
title_cn: 纽约市的 Mamdani 模仿特朗普和马斯克 DOGE 的 COGE 计划
summary: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani said he’s forming a new Commission of Government Efficiency, or COGE, to improve the way City Hall spends public funds.

title: Ethiopia Says Bondholders Reject Latest Proposal of 12% Haircut
title_cn: 埃塞俄比亚称债券持有人拒绝最新削减 12% 的提议
summary: Ethiopia’s finance ministry said restructuring talks with some bondholders fell through after they rebuffed its latest proposal for them to take a 12% loss, drawing out a default that dates back to December 2023.

title: Merz Aims to Halt Party Unrest With Vow to Revive Germany
title_cn: 梅尔茨致力于制止党派骚乱，誓言复兴德国
summary: Chancellor Friedrich Merz brushed aside talk that his plummeting popularity could prompt a bid to replace him as head Germany’s government as he vowed to press ahead with a reform agenda.

title: EU’s Economic Powers Seek Unity to Push Capital Markets Merger
title_cn: 欧盟经济大国寻求团结推动资本市场合并
summary: The European Union’s six largest economies are advancing plans for a bloc-wide capital markets union, hoping their collective voice will spur the continent to action after years of delay.

title: Swiss Police Say Train Station Attack Was a ‘Terrorist’ Incident
title_cn: 瑞士警方称火车站袭击是一起“恐怖”事件
summary: Three people were injured in a knife attack in the Swiss city of Winterthur on Thursday in what authorities have deemed a “terrorist” act.

title: The DOJ Wants to Know Who on Reddit and X Is Criticizing ICE's Tactics
title_cn: DOJ 想知道 Reddit 和 X 上谁批评 ICE 的策略
summary: In seeking identities of those behind anonymous social media posts, the Trump administration is intensifying its pursuit using grand jury subpoenas.

title: Siddaramaiah Resigns as Chief Minister of Karnataka in India
title_cn: 西达拉玛辞去印度卡纳塔克邦首席部长职务
summary: Siddaramaiah has resigned from his position as the chief minister of the southern Indian state of Karnataka, one of the few states governed by the country’s opposition parties.

title: California ‘Class Traitor’ Tom Steyer Wants to Tax His Fellow Billionaires
title_cn: 加州“阶级叛徒”汤姆·斯泰尔想要向他的亿万富翁同胞征税
summary: The former hedge fund titan is waging one of the most expensive gubernatorial campaigns in US history — on a platform the business community hates.

title: Sweden to Sell, Donate Saab Jets to Ukraine to Aid Defense
title_cn: 瑞典将向乌克兰出售、捐赠萨博喷气式飞机以援助国防
summary: Sweden said it will sell 20 of the latest model Saab Gripen fighter jets to Ukraine and donate 16 older versions of the aircraft to support Kyiv’s fight against the Russian invasion.

title: Singapore’s Top Envoy Meets Kim Jong Un’s Close Aide on Rare Trip
title_cn: 新加坡高级特使罕见访问金正恩亲密助手
summary: Singapore’s foreign minister held talks with a top aide to North Korean leader Kim Jong Un in a rare visit to Pyongyang, urging the isolated state to keep channels for dialogue open with the outside world.

title: Talarico Gets $3 Million in One Day as Texas to Become Money Pit
title_cn: 德克萨斯州沦为金钱坑，塔拉里科一日赚 300 万美元
summary: As Donald Trump celebrated Ken Paxton’s landslide win in Texas, Republican officials were busy gearing up for a brutal fight that may end up costing them more than $100 million to stop a Democrat from flipping a seat in a state the president won by 14 percentage points.

title: Hungary Is ‘Very Close’ to EU Funding Deal, Premier Magyar Says
title_cn: 匈牙利总理马扎尔表示，匈牙利“非常接近”达成欧盟资助协议
summary: Hungarian Prime Minister Peter Magyar said his government is “very close” to a deal with the European Union that would open the way for the release of billions of euros in suspended aid and ease the pressure on the cash-strapped budget.
